heading: Omitted
label: 590a Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which credited funds to the Shoshone-Bannock Tribes of the Fort Hall Reservation for certain claims, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 92–442, § 186 Stat. 743Sept. 29, 1972
